home.title: 2026 OPC One-Person Company Co-creation Conference
home.subtitle: AI Empowers Individual Success · Digital-Physical Integration for Co-created Ecosystem

about.title: About the Conference
about.description:
In an era where AI is comprehensively reconstructing individual productivity, one-person companies have become efficient, flexible, and highly dynamic business units, breaking traditional entrepreneurial boundaries and maximizing the release of individual value.

This OPCC focuses on the core tracks of AI + one-person company, super individuals, small and micro entrepreneurship, and digital-physical integration. We have a special AI application exhibition area, focusing on cutting-edge applications such as AI large models, AIGC, intelligent operation, AI Agent, and digital SaaS. We build a professional, accurate, and long-term symbiotic resource co-creation and exchange platform for individual entrepreneurs, AI service providers, and industry partners.

This conference innovatively adopts a co-creation sharing mechanism: breaking the traditional speech model, participants can independently initiate topics, which are voted by all attendees, and corresponding venues are arranged according to topic popularity for public speech sharing. This truly realizes "everyone can be a speaker, everyone can voice", allowing every participant to become the core of the conference.

individual.name: Visitor Ticket
benefits: Free access to all sub-forums and AI exhibition area
Permanent membership to OPCC public communication community

creator.name: OPCC Creator Ticket
benefits: Full access to main forum, all sub-forums and exhibition areas
Can independently initiate speech topics supported by all attendees
Higher topic popularity will get bigger venue for formal speech
Priority access to closed-door co-creation salons with industry guests
Exclusive priority for on-site resource matching and project connection
Free complete printed + digital conference materials
Membership to OPC core co-creation community, connecting high-end contacts
Exclusive fast check-in channel with one-on-one on-site service

benefits.title: General Booth Benefits
items: Exclusive right to use the corresponding location in the exhibition area
Brand exposure in conference proceedings and official materials
Synchronized brand promotion through all official channels
Includes corresponding quota of OPCC Creator tickets
Free access to all conferences, forums and resource matching activities

ai.title: AI Exhibition Categories
ai.description: The conference prioritizes inviting the following AI-related organizations/individuals to exhibit in the exclusive AI zone:
categories: AI large model applications, AI Agent development services
AIGC tools for copywriting, design, audio/video, digital humans
AI operations, AI customer service, AI data analysis, automation SaaS
AI + finance & taxation, AI + legal, AI + consulting, AI + education
Digital one-stop solutions for one-person companies
Digital-physical integration, AI empowering high-quality physical industry projects

register.title: Registration Information
register.deadline: Registration Deadline: August 20, 2026 (Limited spots, no last-minute registrations accepted when full)

process.title: Registration Process
steps: Scan QR code to fill information

notes.title: Notes
items: On-site check-in requires electronic certificate, please arrive 30 minutes early to avoid delays
Self-initiated topics must be positive, closely aligned with conference theme, and comply with national laws and regulations
Exhibitors must strictly abide by the management regulations of China National Convention Center and the organizing committee, violations will result in cancellation of qualification
Ticket and booth fees are non-refundable once confirmed unless caused by the organizer, but can be transferred

footer.slogan: AI Empowers, Even One Can Build an Army; Co-create Together, Everyone Can Be a Speaker.
